name: andrej-karpathy-skills
tagline: One markdown file, six figures of stars
description: A single CLAUDE.md distilling Andrej Karpathy's public observations on LLM coding failure modes into four rules — think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, goal-driven execution — installable as a plugin or dropped into any project.
why: Possibly the highest star-to-content ratio on GitHub: one markdown file, 150k+ stars. A cultural datapoint about prompts becoming artifacts. Note carefully: it is not authored by or affiliated with Karpathy, despite the name.
useCases: Steering Claude Code or Cursor behavior
A template for writing your own CLAUDE.md

setup.requirements: Copy one file, or install as a plugin; requires Claude Code or Cursor

license.notes: A content repository, not software — what you are starring is a prompt.

limitations: The implied endorsement is absent — Karpathy has no connection to this repo. The advice itself is sensible but generic.
take: Included less as a recommendation than as an exhibit: the moment prompt files started accumulating stars like frameworks.
